title: Rename device - dialog
scenario: Rename device dialog does not match Figma design when navigating to Device Settings > General and tapping device name
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on General.
5. Locate the device's official name displayed on the General screen.
6. Tap on the device's official name.
expected: A dialog appears with Cancel and Done buttons, a text field for entering the new device name, and the keyboard visible below. The dialog matches the Figma design.
